query:
-- Apollo credit log: what's the actual reveal success rate from API calls
SELECT 
  action,
  COUNT(*) as total_calls,
  SUM(CASE WHEN creditsUsed > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as paid_reveals,
  SUM(CASE WHEN creditsUsed = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as free_or_failed,
  SUM(creditsUsed) as total_credits,
  MIN(createdAt) as first_call,
  MAX(createdAt) as last_call
FROM apolloCreditLog
GROUP BY action
ORDER BY total_calls DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
-- Apollo credit log: what's the actual reveal success rate from API calls
SELECT 
  action,
  COUNT(*) as total_calls,
  SUM(CASE WHEN creditsUsed > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as paid_reveals,
  SUM(CASE WHEN creditsUsed = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as free_or_failed,
  SUM(creditsUsed) as total_credits,
  MIN(createdAt) as first_call,
  MAX(createdAt) as last_call
FROM apolloCreditLog
GROUP BY action
ORDER BY total_calls DESC
LIMIT 20;
